name: Inference

dataUsage.details: Privacy Policy states they do not share or sell customer data and do not use customer data to train AI models; they say data is used only to provide AI inference services and to debug issues.

notes: Inference R&D, Inc. appears to be a US-based provider with public privacy policy and SOC 2 Type II marketing claims, but no primary-source public DPA, sub-processor list, SCC statement, retention schedule, or data residency documentation could be confirmed from the provider’s accessible official pages. Terms state personal information may be transferred to and/or processed in the United States, so EU-only processing could not be verified.
